title: The Biorepository and Integrative Genomics resource for inclusive genomics: insights from a diverse pediatric and admixed cohort.
author: Buonaiuto S Marsico F Mohammed A Chinthala LK Amos-Abanyie EK Regeneron Genetics Center Prins P Mozhui K Rooney RJ Williams RW Davis RL Finkel TH Brown CW Colonna V
content: S-EPMC11722445 PMC11722445 The Biorepository and Integrative Genomics resource for inclusive genomics: insights from a diverse pediatric and admixed cohort. The Biorepository and Integrative Genomics (BIG) Initiative in Tennessee has developed a pioneering resource to address gaps in genomic
